title: Book Info Tracker
description: Create a struct to store book details and print them.
problemStatement:
Structures allows you to group different data types. Define a `struct Book` with `title` (string), `pages` (int), and `price` (float).

**Requirement:** Initialize a book with `"C Programming", 300, 29.99` and print its details.
hints: Use `struct Book { ... };` to define the template.
Access members using the dot `.` operator.
